chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.S-1633 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 07.11.2016. Mr. Altaf Hussain Chandio, Advocate alongwith petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G a/w ASI Muhammad Saleem of P.S Digri Distrcit Mirpurkhas. = Mr. Altaf Ahmed Shahid Abro, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.4, 5, 6, 8 & 9, who are also present in Court and have denied the allegations of harassment to the petitioner, while stating that marriage of petitioner No.1-Mst. Khalida with petitioner No.2-Ali Sher is illegal as Mst. Khalida was married at that time. Though this allegation has been controverted by the petitioners’ Counsel with the request that his main anxiety is that respondents should not take law in their hands. Today, the police officials have also filed their comments, in which they have denied the allegations made by the petitioners and in the said comments they have undertaken to provide protection to the petitioners as and when approached by them. The private respondents, if they have any grievance, can seek their remedy through due process of law but without causing any harassment or extending threats to the petitioners. With these observations, instant constitutional petition is disposed of and in this regard official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners under the law, if they are approached by the petitioners with such a request. JUDGE Shahid
